scripts.backend:setup: npm run backend:db && cd backend && (test -d .venv || python3 -m venv .venv) && source .venv/bin/activate && pip install -e . && (test -f .env || cp .env.example .env) && alembic upgrade head
scripts.backend:start: npm run backend:db && cd backend && source .venv/bin/activate && uvicorn assistant_director_api.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
scripts.backend:dev: npm run backend:setup && npm run backend:start
